label: bgdepth_flux
prompt: Keep the chrome hand, the open compact, the holographic CD and the chrome reflected face with its berry lips EXACTLY unchanged in the centre — same shapes, pose, colours and framing. ONLY in the BACKGROUND behind the subject, add subtle extra DEPTH and DIMENSION to the dark galaxy: a few more soft layers of deep-blue and faint violet nebula clouds receding into the distance, scattered distant stars at varying depths, a gentle sense of cosmic depth. Keep it subtle, dark and mostly black, do not brighten or overpower the subject.
